question_en: What should my child do if they are cheated while working online?
question_hi_hinglish: Agar online kaam karte waqt mere bacche ke saath dhokha ho jaye, toh use kya karna chahiye?
answer_en: In 2026, the 'National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal' (1930) is your first line of defense. If a client doesn't pay or a platform scams them, they should immediately report it. Also, using 'Escrow' payments (where money is held by a third party until the work is done) is the law for safe freelancing. We teach them to never start work without a digital contract.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein 'National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal' (1930) aapka sabse bada hathiyar hai. Agar koi paise nahi deta ya scam karta hai, toh turant report karein. Humesha 'Escrow' payments ka use karein, jahan paisa beech mein surakshit rehta hai jab tak kaam khatam na ho. Hum baccho ko digital contract ke bina kaam na karna sikhate hain.

question_en: Do freelancers have any legal rights like regular office workers?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya freelancers ke paas bhi office jaane walo ki tarah kanooni adhikaar hote hain?
answer_en: Yes! Under the 2026 'Social Security for Gig Workers' code, freelancers are now recognized by law. They are entitled to clear payment terms and protection against harassment. If a company refuses to pay for completed work, the child can approach the local labor commissioner or use online legal-tech platforms to send a legal notice easily.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! 2026 ke 'Gig Workers Social Security' kanoon ke tahat freelancers ko pehchaan mili hai. Unhe sahi samay par paise milne chahiye aur unhe harassment se suraksha milti hai. Agar koi company paise rok rahi hai, toh baccha labor commissioner ke paas ja sakta hai ya online legal notice bhej sakta hai.

question_en: What is an 'AI Ethics Auditor'? Is it a career about right and wrong?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'AI Ethics Auditor' kya hota hai? Kya isme sahi-galat ki padhai hoti hai?
answer_en: Exactly. AI can sometimes be unfair or biased. An Ethics Auditor tests AI systems to make sure they don't discriminate based on race, gender, or religion. In 2026, every big tech company needs these 'moral police' to ensure their technology is helpful for everyone, not just a few. It's a high-level role for those who love law and logic.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bilkul sahi. AI kabhi-kabhi galat faisle le sakta hai. Ethics Auditor check karta hai ki AI kisi ke saath bhed-bhav toh nahi kar raha. 2026 mein har badi company ko aise 'moral police' ki zaroorat hai jo technology ko sabke liye barabar banayein. Ye kanoon aur logic pasand karne walo ke liye ek bada career hai.

question_en: My son wants to be a 'Safety Auditor' in factories. Is it a dangerous job?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta factories mein 'Safety Auditor' banna chahta hai. Kya ye khatarnak kaam hai?
answer_en: It’s actually the opposite—he is the person who *prevents* danger. A Safety Auditor inspects machinery, fire exits, and worker gear to ensure no accidents happen. In 2026, with strict government rules for industrial safety in Chhattisgarh, certified auditors are respected professionals who save lives by enforcing the law.
answer_hi_hinglish: Nahi, balki wo khatre ko *rokne* wala hota hai. Safety Auditor machines aur fire exits ki jaanch karta hai taaki koi durghatna na ho. 2026 mein Chhattisgarh ki industries mein safety ke kanoon bahut sakht hain, isliye certified auditors ki bahut izzat hai kyunki wo logon ki jaan bachate hain.

question_en: What is 'Data Privacy Law'? Why should my child care about it?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Data Privacy Law' kya hai? Mere bacche ko iski fikar kyun karni chahiye?
answer_en: In 2026, data is more valuable than gold. Data Privacy Law protects a person’s personal info from being stolen or sold. If your child works in tech or marketing, they must understand these laws to keep their company and customers safe. Professionals who can manage 'Data Compliance' are highly paid because they prevent multi-crore legal mistakes.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein data sone se bhi mehenga hai. Data Privacy Law logon ki jaankari chori hone se bachata hai. Agar aapka baccha tech ya marketing mein kaam karta hai, toh use ye kanoon pata hone chahiye. Jo log 'Data Compliance' sambhalte hain unhe bahut acchi salary milti hai kyunki wo company ko bade kanooni jharpan se bachate hain.

question_en: Is there a career in 'Animal Welfare' that is more than just being a doctor?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya 'Animal Welfare' mein doctor banne ke alawa bhi koi career hai?
answer_en: Yes! You can become a 'Wildlife Conservation Technician' or an 'Animal Ethics Consultant' for zoos and NGOs. In 2026, there is a lot of focus on protecting Chhattisgarh's unique wildlife (like the Wild Buffalo). These roles involve using drones and sensors to monitor animals and ensuring they are treated humanely by the law.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! Aap 'Wildlife Conservation Technician' ban sakte hain ya NGOs ke liye kaam kar sakte hain. 2026 mein Chhattisgarh ke jangli janwaron (jaise Van Bhainsa) ko bachane par bahut zor hai. Isme drones ka use karke janwaron ki raksha karna aur unke kanooni adhikaaron ka dhyan rakhna shamil hai.

question_en: If my child creates a video or a design, can someone else steal it?
question_hi_hinglish: Agar mera baccha koi video ya design banata hai, toh kya koi aur use chura sakta hai?
answer_en: Not if they know 'Intellectual Property (IP) Rights.' In 2026, creators can digitally watermark and register their work easily. If someone steals it, the law allows the creator to sue for damages. Understanding Copyright and Trademarks is a vital skill for every creative student in the Pehchaan program.
answer_hi_hinglish: Agar unhe 'IP Rights' ki jaankari hai, toh koi nahi chura sakta. 2026 mein kalakaar apne kaam ko digitaly register kar sakte hain. Agar koi use chori karta hai, toh kanoon ke tahat uspar karwai ki ja sakti hai. Har creative bacche ko 'Copyright' aur 'Trademark' ki samajh hona zaroori hai.

question_en: What is 'Cyber-harassment' and how can my daughter stay safe while working online?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Cyber-harassment' kya hota hai? Meri beti online kaam karte waqt surakshit kaise rahe?
answer_en: Cyber-harassment is any form of bullying or unwanted pressure online. In 2026, platforms have strict 'Code of Conduct' and blocking tools. We teach students to keep professional and personal lives separate, use secure communication apps, and report any inappropriate behavior to the platform's HR or the Cyber Cell immediately.
answer_hi_hinglish: Internet par kisi ko pareshan karna Cyber-harassment hai. 2026 mein platforms par iske liye bahut sakht niyam hain. Hum baccho ko professional aur personal zindagi alag rakhna sikhate hain. Agar koi pareshan kare, toh turant use block karein aur company ke HR ya Cyber Cell mein report karein.
